headline: School geography class: South-east Asian floods
body_text:
This article picked by a teacher with suggested questions is part of the Financial Times free schools access programme. Details/registration here.

Read our full range of geography picks here.

Click to read the articles below and then answer the questions:

Flood death toll surpasses 1,500 across south-east Asia

Explore the full RGS worksheet on the FT articles on South-East Asian flood here.

Rachel Owen, Royal Geographical Society
